UAE.container_type: 40ft Reefer / Open truck for short transit
UAE.note: Closest export market — lowest cost, fastest transit

primary_wholesale_markets.name: Rungis International Market
primary_wholesale_markets.note: Largest wholesale market in Europe — handles most Indian agri imports via Rotterdam

EU.indian_diaspora_demand: High — UK Indian community + European South Asian diaspora

primary_wholesale_markets.name: New Covent Garden Market
primary_wholesale_markets.note: Primary landing market for Indian vegetables — onion, mango, chilli

primary_wholesale_markets.name: Birmingham Wholesale Market
primary_wholesale_markets.note: Key for Midlands distribution — large South Asian diaspora

UK.indian_diaspora_demand: Very High — largest South Asian community in Europe

primary_wholesale_markets.name: Hunts Point Produce Market
primary_wholesale_markets.note: Largest produce market in USA — primary entry for Indian exports

primary_wholesale_markets.name: LA Wholesale Produce Market
primary_wholesale_markets.note: West Coast entry point — large Indian-American community

USA.indian_diaspora_demand: High — 4.4 million Indian-Americans concentrated in NY/NJ/CA/TX/IL

primary_wholesale_markets.name: Dubai Wholesale City (Fruit & Veg Market)
primary_wholesale_markets.note: Largest wholesale market in Middle East — re-exports to GCC countries

primary_wholesale_markets.name: Abu Dhabi Central Market
primary_wholesale_markets.note: Key for Abu Dhabi and Al Ain distribution

UAE.indian_diaspora_demand: Very High — 3.5 million Indians in UAE, dominant food preference

maharashtra.name: Maharashtra State Agricultural Marketing Board (MSAMB)
maharashtra.note: Primary government handler — assists with APEDA registration and export documentation

maharashtra.name: APEDA Registered Exporters — Mumbai
maharashtra.note: Full list available on APEDA website — filter by commodity and state

maharashtra.name: Mahagrapes (Maharashtra Grape Growers Association)
maharashtra.note: Specialized for Nashik grape exports — direct EU connections

all_exports: Phytosanitary Certificate (Plant Quarantine Authority of India)
EU_specific: EU Pesticide Residue Test Report (NABL accredited lab)
USA_specific: FDA Prior Notice (minimum 8 hours before arrival)
USDA APHIS Import Permit (for certain commodities)
